description: Parivahan Sewa is India’s Ministry of Road Transport and Highways portal for transport-related services and information, including vehicle registration, driving licence, permit, and enforcement-related systems. It fronts access to the National Transport Repository, a centralized transport data platform managed by MoRTH/NIC.
summary: parivahan.co.in/public Parivahan documentation points to one developer-facing integration surface: the National Transport Repository (NTR) with portal/API-based access for approved organizations; no public OpenAPI/GraphQL/MCP/CLI docs were found on the domain.
